cases.description: Nominal health request stays healthy under the Phase 11 corpus
Duplicate content-length headers are rejected fail-closed
cases.request:
POST /healthz HTTP/1.1
Host: 127.0.0.1
Content-Length: 5
Content-Length: 5

hello

cases.description: Mixed content-length and transfer-encoding requests are rejected
cases.request:
POST /healthz HTTP/1.1
Host: 127.0.0.1
Content-Length: 5
Transfer-Encoding: chunked

hello

GET /ws/echo HTTP/1.1
Host: 127.0.0.1
Upgrade: websocket
Connection: Upgrade
Sec-WebSocket-Key: dGhlIHNhbXBsZSBub25jZQ==
Sec-WebSocket-Version: 12
Origin: https://allowed.example

cases.description: WebSocket upgrades require a valid 16-byte base64 nonce
cases.request:
GET /ws/echo HTTP/1.1
Host: 127.0.0.1
Upgrade: websocket
Connection: Upgrade
Sec-WebSocket-Key: invalid-key
Sec-WebSocket-Version: 13
Origin: https://allowed.example

cases.description: Configured origin allowlist rejects unexpected origins
cases.request:
GET /ws/echo HTTP/1.1
Host: 127.0.0.1
Upgrade: websocket
Connection: Upgrade
Sec-WebSocket-Key: dGhlIHNhbXBsZSBub25jZQ==
Sec-WebSocket-Version: 13
Origin: https://blocked.example
